title: About Us
name: Gilbert Team
bio:
# The Gilbert Development Team

We are **passionate** developers creating modern tooling for the web. Our mission is to revolutionize static site generation using cutting-edge *Web API streams*.

## Our Approach

The Gilbert project focuses on:

- **Performance**: Leveraging Web API streams for efficient data processing
- **Modularity**: Clean separation of concerns with pluggable adapters
- **Developer Experience**: Intuitive APIs that make complex tasks simple
- **Modern Standards**: Built for the latest web platform capabilities

## Technology Stack

| Technology | Purpose | Status |
|------------|---------|--------|
| ReadableStream | Core data flow | ✅ Implemented |
| TransformStream | Data processing | ✅ Implemented |
| WritableStream | Output generation | ✅ Implemented |
| ESBuild | Script bundling | ✅ Implemented |
| Handlebars | Template engine | ✅ Implemented |

### Key Features

1. **Stream-based Architecture**: All data flows through Web API streams
2. **Middleware Support**: Extensible data transformation pipeline
3. **Multi-format Output**: HTML, CSS, JS, and static files
4. **Developer Tools**: Built-in debugging and performance monitoring

> "Gilbert represents the next generation of static site generators, built from the ground up for modern web development." - *Core Team*
